ValidationRule.description: Limits the user from selecting different probabilities than 0, 10, 25, 50, 60, 80, 100 Applies to New Sales / Renewal / Inside Sales
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: And( OR( RecordType.Id = '012b0000000M3zQ', RecordType.Id = '012b0000000Udf0', RecordType.Id = '012b0000000M3zV' ), ischanged( Probability ), not( or( Probability = 0, Probability = 0.1, Probability = 0.25, Probability = 0.5, Probability = 0.6, Probability = 0.8, Probability = 1 ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please change your input to one of the following values: 0, 10, 25, 50, 60, 80, 100
